frameworks.name: abstract factorized population coding
frameworks.one_line: CA1 population disentangles task variables into factorized abstract representations

frameworks.name: cognitive map / internal world model
frameworks.one_line: hippocampal state-machine view extended from sequential episodes to non-sequential category learning

frameworks.name: categorization vs simple discrimination
frameworks.one_line: category training produces qualitatively different coding than pure discrimination

core_question: How does hippocampal CA1 population coding change across stages of category learning compared to simple discrimination?
key_assumptions: hippocampus encodes task-relevant and latent variables
calcium imaging tracks CA1 population coding across training
key_findings: CA1 coding changes critically across categorization training stages
choice and outcome variables become disentangled into factorized abstract representations
factorized geometry distinguishes categorization from simple discrimination
factorized geometry tracks improved behavioral performance
interpretations: category learning reshapes hippocampal coding toward abstract factorized representations
hippocampal cognitive-map / world-model function extends to non-sequential categorization
